evidence.note: SQLCipher product is linked only .when(platforms: applePlatforms, traits: ["SQLCipher"]); iOS is in applePlatforms, so encryption works when the SQLCipher trait is enabled — conditional, hence unknown.

The SQLCipher dependency is linked only on Apple platforms, so the trait-gated Cipher API is unlikely to be functional on Linux — but manifest scoping is not absence evidence, so status stays unknown.
applePlatforms ([.iOS, .macOS, .watchOS, .tvOS, .visionOS]) does not list .macCatalyst; whether the SQLCipher product condition extends to Catalyst is unclear.
